vision: Create a guided planning flow that turns a program lead vision into reviewed epics, approved features, and sprint-ready stories.
desiredOutcomes: Expose review gates before sprint commitment
Make acceptance criteria easier to test

reviewCheckpoints.label: Feature review
reviewCheckpoints.notes: Feature review opens after epic approval.

epics.title: Vision alignment and success framing
epics.summary: Translate the program lead vision into outcomes, assumptions, and measurable success signals for Refinement Workspace.
acceptanceCriteria: Document the core problem, target users, and value proposition
Capture at least three measurable outcomes tied to the vision
List open questions that require lead review

epics.title: Refinement facilitation and story readiness
epics.summary: Define the facilitation flow that turns messy refinement notes into structured, sprint-ready stories with explicit review gates for agile facilitators and product owners.
acceptanceCriteria: Map the end-to-end backlog flow from vision to sprint-ready stories
Define how messy notes are transformed into structured user stories
Identify the review checkpoints needed to keep refinement work moving

epics.title: Quality and onboarding acceleration
epics.summary: Pair story generation with QE-ready test cases and a document-grounded onboarding guide so new contributors can execute confidently in Refinement Workspace.
acceptanceCriteria: Generate test-ready coverage from approved acceptance criteria
Describe the first-run onboarding journey for new contributors
Connect onboarding materials back to desired outcomes

features.title: Vision intake workspace
features.summary: Capture vision, program lead context, desired outcomes, and user segments in a structured planning intake.
acceptanceCriteria: Program lead can submit a concise vision statement
Desired outcomes can be edited as separate items
Target user context is visible in the generated plan

features.title: Refinement facilitator
features.summary: Convert messy backlog refinement notes into structured, sprint-ready user stories with DoR validation.
acceptanceCriteria: Problem statements stay aligned with story summaries
Acceptance criteria mix Gherkin and checklist items
DoR gaps are called out without inventing requirements

onboardingChecklist.title: Confirm the vision intake
onboardingChecklist.detail: Read the vision and desired outcomes before decomposing the backlog.

onboardingChecklist.title: Review the epic gate
onboardingChecklist.detail: Use the epic review checkpoint to validate scope before features are drafted.

onboardingChecklist.title: Review the feature gate
onboardingChecklist.detail: Confirm the feature breakdown before stories are produced.

onboardingChecklist.title: Start story-ready delivery
onboardingChecklist.detail: Move into sprint planning once the backlog is story-ready.
